Overton (@overton_news)

Bill O’Reilly LOSES IT on Chris Cuomo after Cuomo claims President Trump is “the boy who cried wolf” on Iran.

“Wait a minute — who’s the boy crying wolf?!”

CUOMO: “This is not helping the domestic situation right now. And I think promises that gas prices will be even better after this is a silly thing to say.”

O’REILLY: “Wait…wait…wait…wait!”

CUOMO: “I do think he’s going on affordability tour in for a real reason.”

O’REILL
